plugin_desc: Avocent ACS console-server SNMP child template for devices under Avocent enterprise PEN 10418. The shared ConsoleServer SNMP floor supplies MIB-II uptime and IF-MIB 64-bit HC interface traffic. Current public MIB facts confirm the ACS product subtree but do not prove stable shared CPU, memory, temperature, fan or power device-health scalars, so this child template does not promote private objects into shared health metrics.
name: ConsoleServer
